baseline.description: Clean multi-turn home-goods conversation. Exercises all seven inputs; honors the anchor rule and the under-$60 commitment.
memory_seed: User is furnishing a new apartment kitchen.
baseline.initial_compaction: Standing constraints: recommend in-stock items only; keep recommendations under $60.

turns.user_query: I'd like an electric coffee maker for the kitchen, under $60.
Nice. Anything to keep the coffee hot after it's brewed?
Great. Now I need a good knife set.
And some pots and pans for cooking?
